title: lolium perenne subsp. rigidum
intro: Lolium perenne subsp. rigidum, also known as rigid ryegrass, is a perennial grass species within the Lolium genus that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in relieving symptoms of respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Lolium perenne subsp. rigidum has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
